final_prompt.prompt:
Design a brand identity logo for a children's clothing store called "Bolabatom Kids".

风格/媒介: Minimalist and modern brand identity design; clean, elegant, commercially focused; "infantil elegante" — refined children's aesthetic without exaggerated playful elements
构图: Centered logo lockup with brand name as primary element; balanced negative space; organized and structured layout
主体: Logo for "Bolabatom Kids" — children's clothing store brand mark; modern, rounded wordmark with a small complementary icon or graphic element
场景/背景: White or off-white background
光线/氛围: Clean, welcoming, trustworthy, modern — conveys desire and confidence
色彩方案: Soft rose / blush pink (primary); beige / nude; white; sophisticated neutral tones — no neon colors
材质/纹理: Flat vector graphic style
文字(原样): Bolabatom Kids
约束: Typography must feel modern, rounded, and friendly for the primary font; secondary font simple, elegant, and legible; avoid exaggerated childish elements; avoid cluttered or busy visuals
避免: Neon colors; visual pollution; overly childish or cartoon-heavy elements
